name: SurfDock
description: Surface-informed diffusion generative model for protein-ligand docking. Uses molecular surface features (geometry, electrostatics, chemical) for accurate pose prediction. Poses are rescored with smina for binding affinity estimation.
capabilities: Surface-informed diffusion generative model for protein-ligand docking
Uses molecular surface features (geometry, electrostatics, chemical) for accurate pose prediction
Poses are rescored with smina for binding affinity estimation

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

n_poses.description: Number of docking poses to generate
